coach.hint: Chunk it: Trust us, / sir.

items.line_en: Goodbye.

coach.say: Goodbye.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Goodbye.

items.line_en: What have bothered you recently?

coach.say: What have bothered you recently?
coach.hint: Chunk it: What have bothered you recently?

items.line_en: I've been having trouble breathing lately.

coach.say: I've been having trouble breathing lately.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I've been having trouble breathing lately.

items.line_en: Can you describe the symptoms to me?

coach.say: Can you describe the symptoms to me?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Can you describe the symptoms to me?

items.line_en: Sure, I've got a dry cough and always in a tiring state.

coach.say: Sure, I've got a dry cough and always in a tiring state.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sure, / I've got a dry cough and always in a tiring state.

items.line_en: Do you have heavy feeling when you breathe?

coach.say: Do you have heavy feeling when you breathe?
coach.hint: Chunk it: Do you have heavy feeling when / you breathe?

items.line_en: Oh yeah, just like someone punch into my chest.

coach.say: Oh yeah, just like someone punch into my chest.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Oh yeah, / just like someone punch into my chest.

items.line_en: It's hard to breathe.

coach.say: It's hard to breathe.
coach.hint: Chunk it: It's hard to breathe.

items.line_en: The COVID-19 symptoms are quite similar to yours.

coach.say: The COVID-19 symptoms are quite similar to yours.
coach.hint: Chunk it: The COVID-19 symptoms are quite similar to yours.

items.line_en: I think you must be hospitalized for further studies.

coach.say: I think you must be hospitalized for further studies.
coach.hint: Chunk it: I think you must be hospitalized for further studies.

items.line_en: Sounds terrifying.

coach.say: Sounds terrifying.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Sounds terrifying.

items.line_en: Don't worry.

coach.say: Don't worry.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't worry.

items.line_en: We can handle this.

coach.say: We can handle this.
coach.hint: Chunk it: We can handle this.

items.line_en: Don't forget to give us a like.

coach.say: Don't forget to give us a like.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Don't forget to give us a like.

items.line_en: Thank you and see you again.

coach.say: Thank you and see you again.
coach.hint: Chunk it: Thank you and / see you again.
